summary: HTTP-Only Cookie Authentication Migration - All tests passed. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: 7/7 tests passed. The P0 security migration from localStorage JWTs to HTTP-Only cookies is fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend auth.ts correctly sets HTTP-Only cookie with proper attributes: httpOnly=true, secure=conditional, sameSite=lax, maxAge=7days, path=/
Backend auth middleware correctly reads token from req.cookies.auth_token first, then falls back to Authorization header for backward compatibility
Frontend api.ts uses credentials:'include' for all fetch requests to send cookies cross-origin
Frontend Login.tsx does NOT save token to localStorage - only cleans up legacy localStorage.removeItem('token')
Frontend Dashboard.tsx uses authApi.getMe() on mount and redirects to /login on 401 error
Logout endpoint correctly clears the auth_token cookie
Raleway font is properly imported in index.css and applied via --font-heading CSS variable
CORS configuration has credentials:true enabled in server.ts
context_for_next_testing_agent: HTTP-Only cookie auth migration is complete and working. Cookie name is 'auth_token'. Backend still supports Bearer token in Authorization header for backward compatibility. Two harmless 401s on /api/settings/brand are expected on login page (BrandThemeProvider fetches before auth).

Backend_Login_Sets_HTTPOnly_Cookie.details: POST /api/auth/login sets auth_token cookie with HttpOnly, SameSite=Lax, Path=/, Max-Age attributes

Backend_AuthMe_With_Cookie.details: GET /api/auth/me returns user data when auth_token cookie is sent

Backend_AuthMe_Without_Cookie_401.details: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 when no cookie or auth header is provided

Backend_Bearer_Token_Fallback.details: Auth middleware still accepts Bearer token in Authorization header for backward compatibility

Backend_Invalid_Credentials_401.details: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401 without setting cookie

Backend_Cookie_Security_Attributes.details: Cookie has HttpOnly, SameSite=Lax, Path=/, Max-Age attributes

Frontend_Login_Page_Renders.details: Login page renders with email field (data-testid=login-email), password field (data-testid=login-password), and submit button (data-testid=login-submit)

Frontend_Login_Navigates_To_Dashboard.details: Login with valid credentials navigates to /dashboard

Frontend_Dashboard_Loads_User_Data.details: Dashboard loads and shows welcome section with user data

Frontend_No_LocalStorage_Token.details: No 'token' in localStorage after login - cookie-only auth confirmed

Frontend_Raleway_Font_On_Headings.details: H1 font-family is 'Raleway, Inter, sans-serif'. CSS variable --font-heading is 'Raleway', 'Inter', sans-serif

Frontend_Logout_Redirects_To_Login.details: Logout button works and redirects to /login

Frontend_After_Logout_Dashboard_Redirect.details: After logout, accessing /dashboard redirects back to /login (cookie cleared)
